Class Implementor

java.lang.Object
info.kgeorgiy.ja.islamova.implementor.Implementor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Impler, JarImpler
public class Implementor extends Object implements Impler, JarImpler
Implementation of Impler and JarImpler interfaces The class provides some functions like: - Generate default implementations of classes and interfaces - Compile and package the generated files into JAR files

  • Constructor Details

    • Implementor

      public Implementor()
      Default constructor for class Implementor

  • Method Details

    • implement

      public void implement(Class<?> token, Path root) throws ImplerException
      Generates a default implementation of given interface or extension оf given class
      Specified by:
      implement in interface Impler
      Parameters:
      token - the class or interface to implement
      root - the root directory where the implementation will be generated
      Throws:
      ImplerException - if: - The token is a primitive type, array, private, record, final class or enum - Package name of token is wrong (java.* or javax.*) - Failed to create package directory - There are IO errors during generating and writing source code into file

    • addParameters

      private void addParameters(StringBuilder sb, List<Parameter> parameters) throws ImplerException
      Adds parameters to a method or constructor signature
      Parameters:
      sb - the StringBuilder to append it to main source
      parameters - the list of parameters to add
      Throws:
      ImplerException - if any argument is private

    • addSuper

      private void addSuper(StringBuilder sb, List<Parameter> parameters)
      Adds a super constructor call to constructor
      Parameters:
      sb - the StringBuilder to append it to main source
      parameters - the list of parameters for the super call

    • addExceptions

      private void addExceptions(StringBuilder sb, List<Class<?>> exceptions)
      Adds exceptions to a method or constructor signature.
      Parameters:
      sb - the StringBuilder to append it to main source
      exceptions - the list of exception types to add

    • addConstructors

      private void addConstructors(StringBuilder sb, Class<?> token) throws ImplerException
      Adds constructors to the generated class.
      Parameters:
      sb - the StringBuilder to append it to main source
      token - the class for which constructors are generated
      Throws:
      ImplerException - all constructors are private

    • addReturn

      private void addReturn(StringBuilder sb, String returned)
      Adds a return statement to a method body
      Parameters:
      sb - the StringBuilder to append it to main source
      returned - the return value

    • addBody

      private void addBody(StringBuilder sb, Method method)
      Adds a method body with default return values
      Parameters:
      sb - the StringBuilder to append it to main source
      method - the method for which the body is generated

    • createMethods

      private void createMethods(HashSet<Method> methods, StringBuilder sb) throws ImplerException
      Creates implemented methods for all abstract methods
      Parameters:
      methods - the set of methods to implement
      sb - the StringBuilder to append it to main source
      Throws:
      ImplerException - if method or return type is private

    • addMethods

      private void addMethods(StringBuilder sb, Class<?> token) throws ImplerException
      Filters and adds method implementations to the generated class.
      Parameters:
      sb - the StringBuilder to append it to main source
      token - the class or interface which methods are implemented
      Throws:
      ImplerException - if any method cannot be implemented

    • generateSourceCode

      private String generateSourceCode(Class<?> token, String className, String packageName) throws ImplerException
      Generates the source code for implemented class
      Parameters:
      token - the class or interface to implement
      className - the name of the Impl class
      packageName - the package name for the new class
      Returns:
      the generated source code as a String
      Throws:
      ImplerException - if there are errors during code generation

    • compile

      public static void compile(List<Path> files, List<Class<?>> dependencies, Charset charset)
      Compiles files with the given dependencies
      Parameters:
      files - the list of files to compile
      dependencies - the list of dependency classes required for compilation
      charset - the charset for compilation

    • getClassPath

      private static List<Path> getClassPath(List<Class<?>> dependencies)
      Gets classpath notes for the given dependencies.
      Parameters:
      dependencies - the list of dependency classes
      Returns:
      the list of paths

    • toUnicode

      private String toUnicode(String s)
      Converts a string to its Unicode
      Parameters:
      s - the string to convert
      Returns:
      the Unicode string

    • deleteFiles

      private void deleteFiles(Path dir) throws IOException
      Deletes files and directories in given directory
      Parameters:
      dir - the directory and files there to delete
      Throws:
      IOException - if there are errors while deleting

    • implementJar

      public void implementJar(Class<?> token, Path jarFile) throws ImplerException
      Generates a JAR file which have the implementation of the given class or interface.
      Specified by:
      implementJar in interface JarImpler
      Parameters:
      token - the class or interface to implement
      jarFile - the path for the created JAR file
      Throws:
      ImplerException - if: - Token or jarFile is null - There are errors while creating of temporary directory - There are errors during implementation generation or compilation - There are errors during JAR file creation

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Main method for command-line interface. Usage: - For implementation: className outputPath - For JAR implementation: -jar className jarFile
      Parameters:
      args - command line arguments
